message:
feat(pages): Add pre-computed analytics generator (P1.2a)

Create src/pages/analytics.rs with AnalyticsGenerator for generating
pre-computed analytics JSON files during export:

Generated files:
- statistics.json: Total counts, per-agent stats, roles, time range
- timeline.json: Daily/weekly/monthly activity + per-agent breakdown
- workspace_summary.json: Paths, display names, message counts, recent titles
- agent_summary.json: Conversation/message counts, workspaces, averages
- top_terms.json: Common terms extracted from titles (stop word filtering)

Key types:
- AnalyticsGenerator: Main generator with generate_all() method
- AnalyticsBundle: Container for all analytics data with write_to_dir()
- Statistics, Timeline, WorkspaceSummary, AgentSummary, TopTerms

Features:
- RFC3339 timestamps for JSON serialization
- Stop word filtering for term extraction
- ISO week/month aggregation for timeline
- Comprehensive unit tests (8 tests)

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-ejaq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
